proof fn phi_4_is_empty_kernel_entries_unconstrained(pt: PageTable, i: L4Index)

        pt.is_empty(),
        pt.kernel_l4_end > 0,

{
}
reason: is_empty only constrains L4 entries from kernel_l4_end..512 — kernel-range entries (0..kernel_l4_end) are completely unconstrained and can have arbitrary present entries while the page table is considered "empty"
